name: Sambal Goreng Telor (Eggs in Red Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion and garlic.
2. Heat the butter in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until fragrant.
4. Pour in the coconut milk and stock, stirring occasionally.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Stir in the crushed red pepper, paprika, and Laos powder (if using).
7. Gently add the hard-boiled eggs into the saucepan.
8. Continue cooking for 3 minutes until the eggs are fully cooked through.
9. Remove from heat and carefully halve the eggs.
10. Serve hot.
